primary_blocker: Partner is risk-averse — hidden second decision-maker
key_intelligence: Certainty-seeker with a risk-averse partner as the hidden blocker. 13%+VAT offer. The partner who is not on the call needs to be persuaded independently via follow-up documentation. Risk-averse partners respond to: worst-case scenarios being acceptable (STL exit clause vs problem tenant scenario). Frame the risk of LTL (problem tenant, Section 21) vs STL.
top_objections: My partner is nervous about short-let guests
What happens if a guest damages something?
what_resonated: Guest ID verification and security deposits
Exit clause — can return to LTL if needed
lead_language: My partner is worried about it
What if something goes wrong with a guest?
